We get you into the top local results for the searches your customers actually type, then make sure every click has somewhere to go. See how our Local SEO works

sections.heading: Everything your Boston business needs to rank locally.
sections.subheading: One team handles the whole local-search picture — no middlemen, no finger-pointing between vendors.

paragraphs.html: Boston is crowded. The franchise down the street has a budget you can't match, and the top three map-pack spots take most of the clicks. We level that field. We benchmark your Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, and site speed against your top 5 local competitors, then close every gap keeping you off the first page.

You get a dedicated strategist who knows the Boston market — not a ticket queue. We optimize your profile, build the local citations Google trusts, earn real reviews, and write geo-targeted content that wins the neighborhoods you serve. All of it is built to perform for both Google's local pack and the AI answer engines people now ask first.

checklist.text: Google Business Profile optimization built for Boston-area map-pack rankings
Local citations and directory listings that match your Woburn-verified business details exactly
Review generation and reputation management to earn the stars that win clicks
Geo-targeted, neighborhood-level content for the searches your customers use
Technical SEO and site-speed fixes so Google trusts and ranks your site
One login, every metric — no vanity dashboards, no 40-page PDFs nobody reads

sections.heading: Boston SEO, answered.
sections.subheading: The questions Boston business owners actually ask before they hire an SEO company.

items.q: What does a Boston SEO company actually do?
items.a: We get your business found in Google's local results for the searches your Boston-area customers use — things like "[your service] near me" and "[your service] Boston." That means optimizing your Google Business Profile, building local citations and reviews, writing geo-targeted content, and fixing the technical issues on your site. We also handle the website and lead capture so the rankings turn into booked calls, all under one roof.

items.q: How much does SEO cost in Boston?
items.a: Most Boston clients start with our Smart Website & Marketing Package at $500/month (a 12-month agreement). That covers the local-SEO foundation — Google Business Profile optimization, citations, reviews, on-page SEO, plus your website, hosting, and lead capture. When you want to push harder on rankings, our SEO accelerator adds ongoing blog content and link building for $1,299/month. Your free audit includes a clear recommendation for your specific situation. See full options on our Local SEO service page.

items.q: How long until I see SEO results in Boston?
items.a: Climbing into the top three map-pack spots in a competitive Boston market usually takes a few months — it depends on your starting point and your competition. We focus on showing you measurable progress, fast, and reporting it in plain language. And no legitimate agency can promise a #1 ranking — Google doesn't let anyone.

items.q: Do you only work with businesses inside Boston?
items.a: No. We work with small businesses across Greater Boston — the North Shore, MetroWest, and the surrounding towns — from our Woburn home base. We take on Massachusetts-adjacent clients case by case. If you're outside the Northeast, we'll likely refer you elsewhere rather than take work we can't do well.

items.q: What makes AQ Marketing different from other Boston SEO agencies?
items.a: Two things, done at an unfair level: Local SEO and AI-powered websites, under one roof. You get a dedicated strategist instead of a ticket queue, and one login with every metric instead of a 40-page PDF nobody reads. We've ranked Greater Boston businesses since 2003, and you own everything we build — your site, your domain, your Google Business Profile, your data.

items.q: Will you help me show up for "near me" searches?
items.a: Yes — that's the core of local SEO. "Near me" results are driven by your Google Business Profile, your proximity and relevance to the searcher, your reviews, and consistent business information across the web. We optimize all of it so you show up when someone nearby searches for what you do.

items.q: What's the difference between this page and your Local SEO service page?
items.a: This page is about ranking specifically in the Boston market — the neighborhoods, suburbs, and local competition. Our Local SEO service page covers exactly what's included, our full process, and pricing in detail. Want the nuts and bolts? Start there. Want to know how we win in Boston? You're in the right place.
